findings.description: Command injection risk: execSync with string concatenation using user-provided file paths from files-to-commit.json
findings.resolution: FIXED in commit 7d387da: replaced execSync with spawnSync using array arguments

findings.description: Indentation inconsistency inside try/finally block for reviewer lifecycle
findings.resolution: ACCEPTED: minor formatting issue, no functional impact. To be fixed in next formatting pass.

findings.description: sdd.json references .pi/extensions/loom/ui/config-editor.ts which did not exist in initial commits
findings.resolution: FIXED in commit 7d387da: created placeholder config-editor.ts

findings.description: killSubagent only marks status as 'aborted' in memory; actual child process is not killed (no PID tracking)
findings.resolution: ACCEPTED: known limitation for v1. Full process kill requires spawner PID tracking (deferred to v2).

invariant_checks.note: TUI widgets remain read-only; no edit tools exposed to operator
Model config still loaded from subagent-config.json; no hardcoded models added
All UI text in Russian; system/code comments in English
